scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test src/api/*.test.ts src/core/*.test.ts src/rendering/*.test.ts src/hooks/*.test.ts && node --test ../bin/workspaceRoots.test.js
scripts.build:static:github: VITE_MGVIEW_STATIC=true VITE_MGVIEW_APP_DIR= VITE_MGVIEW_PUBLIC_BASE=/mgview/ VITE_MGVIEW_BASE=/mgview/ vite build --outDir dist-pages
scripts.build:static:workspace: VITE_MGVIEW_STATIC=true VITE_MGVIEW_APP_DIR=mgview VITE_MGVIEW_PUBLIC_BASE=/ VITE_MGVIEW_BASE=/mgview/ vite build --outDir dist-pages
scripts.build:site: npm run build:static:github && npm run assemble:site
scripts.build:site:workspace: npm run build:static:workspace && npm run assemble:site:workspace
scripts.build:release: npm run build && npm run assemble:release
